purpose: Wave 3 URL-backed public official payment destinations for utilities, medical/dental, hosting/IT, and education/training. Delta only; no inferred IBANs.

rules.include_safe: Official public source, complete valid IBAN, CUI present, high confidence; duplicates already loaded in earlier atlas files omitted.
rules.contextual_not_safe: Official but restricted-scope accounts such as public-sector treasury or cash-deposit-only are retained with can_contribute_to_safe=false.
rules.excluded: Rows without CUI, P1/conflict/gap rows, and duplicate active IBANs already present in the atlas.
